(a) Except as provided by Subsection (b), the department shall provide a certified abstract of a complete driving record of a license holder, for a fee of $20, to the license holder or a person eligible to receive the information under Sections 730.007 (Permitted Disclosures of Certain Personal Information) (a)(2)(A), (D), and (I).

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.0475 — Disclosure of Abstract Record

(a) Except as provided by Subsection (b), the department shall provide a certified abstract of a complete driving record of a license holder, for a fee of $20, to the license holder or a person eligible to receive the information under Sections 730.007 (Permitted Disclosures of Certain Personal Information) (a)(2)(A), (D), and (I).

(b) If an abstract of a complete driving record does not exist for a license holder, the department shall provide a person making a request under Subsection (a) a certified statement to that effect.

*Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1059 (H.B.3050), Sec. 16, eff. September 1, 2017.*

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: If an abstract of a complete driving record does not exist for a license holder, the department shall provide a person making a request under Subsection (a) a certified statement to that effect.
